revision.comment: Created page with "{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:12, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q106241380]] Wikidata name: Furutama-no-Mikoto [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:18, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I used to be confident this was an independent deity. But apparently I got her gender wrong. I think she is actually identical to or an epi..."
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no qid-linked ja/en/simple source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:32, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:32, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- No source talk page found via linked QID sitelinks (ja/en/simple) at migration time. -->

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:ja>Saigen Jiro]], [[User:ja>Shionomisaki2458]], [[User:simple>CommonsDelinker]], [[User:Lee Vilenski]], [[User:simple>Ferien]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Furutama-no-Mikoto here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
